title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: That all of this is real. Don’t you think so? {{c1::All this AI}}(所有这些人工智能) stuff and all this Bay Area… that {{c2::it’s happening}}(正在发生).
original: That all of this is real. Don’t you think so? All this AI stuff and all this Bay Area… that it’s happening.
translation: 这一切都是真实的。你不觉得吗？所有这些人工智能的内容，还有硅谷的种种……这一切竟然真的在发生。
note:
phrases: All this AI | it’s happening
title: Ilya-Sutskever
source: 
chunk: chunk_0001_366c72
source_lang: en
target_lang: zh

expression_transfer: Useful for lifting specific examples into a broader claim.

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: {{c1::From what I hear}}(据我所知), all the companies have teams that just {{c2::produce new RL environments}}(生成新的强化学习环境) and just add it to the training mix. The question is, well, what are those?
original: From what I hear, all the companies have teams that just produce new RL environments and just add it to the training mix. The question is, well, what are those?
translation: 据我所知，所有公司都有团队专门开发新的强化学习环境，并将其加入训练数据中。问题是，这些环境到底是什么样的？
note:
phrases: From what I hear | produce new RL environments
title: Ilya-Sutskever
source: 
chunk: chunk_0009_caedb9
source_lang: en
target_lang: zh
phrase_types: discourse_organizer | strong_collocation
transfer: Useful for organizing argument flow across longer explanations.
expression_transfer: Useful for organizing argument flow across longer explanations.

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: But {{c1::the economic impact}}(经济影响) seems to be {{c2::dramatically behind}}(远远落后). It’s {{c3::very difficult to make sense of}}(很难理解), how can the model, on the one hand, do these amazing things, and then on the other hand, repeat itself twice in some situation?
original: But the economic impact seems to be dramatically behind. It’s very difficult to make sense of, how can the model, on the one hand, do these amazing things, and then on the other hand, repeat itself twice in some situation?
translation: 但经济影响却明显滞后。这很难理解：为什么模型一方面能做出惊人的表现，另一方面却在某些情况下重复自己两次？
note:
phrases: the economic impact | dramatically behind | very difficult to make sense of
title: Ilya-Sutskever
source: 
chunk: chunk_0004_b5466e
source_lang: en
target_lang: zh
phrase_types: abstraction_bridge | strong_collocation
transfer: Useful for lifting specific examples into a broader claim.
target_phrases: very difficult to make sense of
expression_transfer: Useful for lifting specific examples into a broader claim.

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: This is {{c1::one of the very confusing things}}(最令人困惑的事情之一) about the models right now. How to reconcile the fact that they are {{c2::doing so well}}(表现得如此出色) on evals?
original: This is one of the very confusing things about the models right now. How to reconcile the fact that they are doing so well on evals?
translation: 这正是当前模型最令人困惑的地方之一。如何解释它们在评估中表现如此出色，却又存在这些明显缺陷？
note:
phrases: one of the very confusing things | doing so well
title: Ilya-Sutskever
source: 
chunk: chunk_0004_b5466e
source_lang: en
target_lang: zh
phrase_types: abstraction_bridge | strong_collocation
transfer: Useful for lifting specific examples into a broader claim.
target_phrases: one of the very confusing things
expression_transfer: Useful for lifting specific examples into a broader claim.

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: But there is another explanation. {{c1::Back when}}(在那个时候) people were doing pre-training, the question of what data to train on {{c2::was answered}}(得到了回答), because that answer was everything.
original: But there is another explanation. Back when people were doing pre-training, the question of what data to train on was answered, because that answer was everything.
translation: 但还有另一种解释。当初人们进行预训练时，关于使用什么数据进行训练的问题其实已经有了答案，因为那个答案就是一切。
note:
phrases: Back when | was answered
title: Ilya-Sutskever
source: 
chunk: chunk_0007_c84335
source_lang: en
target_lang: zh
phrase_types: discourse_organizer | strong_collocation
transfer: Useful for organizing argument flow across longer explanations.
expression_transfer: Useful for organizing argument flow across longer explanations.

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: Another thing that’s crazy is {{c1::how normal}}(多么正常) {{c2::the slow takeoff}}(缓慢的起飞) feels. The idea that we’d be investing 1% of GDP in AI, I feel like it would have felt like {{c3::a bigger deal}}(一件更重要的事), whereas right now it just feels...
original: Another thing that’s crazy is how normal the slow takeoff feels. The idea that we’d be investing 1% of GDP in AI, I feel like it would have felt like a bigger deal, whereas right now it just feels...
translation: 另一件令人震惊的事是，缓慢发展的感觉竟然如此正常。我原本以为，如果我们要投入GDP的1%用于AI，这会是一个巨大的事件，但如今感觉却……
note:
phrases: how normal | the slow takeoff | a bigger deal
title: Ilya-Sutskever
source: 
chunk: chunk_0001_366c72
source_lang: en
target_lang: zh
phrase_types: abstraction_bridge | strong_collocation

expression_transfer: Useful for lifting specific examples into a broader claim.

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: Then you tell the model, “Can you please fix the bug?” And the model says, “Oh my God, you’re so right. I have a bug. {{c1::Let me go fix}}(让我去修复一下) that.” And it {{c2::introduces a second bug}}(引入了一个新的错误).
original: Then you tell the model, “Can you please fix the bug?” And the model says, “Oh my God, you’re so right. I have a bug. Let me go fix that.” And it introduces a second bug.
translation: 然后你告诉模型：‘你能把那个bug修好吗？’ 模型却说：‘天啊，你说得对极了，我确实有个bug，我马上去修。’ 结果它修完后又引入了一个新的bug。
note:
phrases: Let me go fix | introduces a second bug
title: Ilya-Sutskever
source: 
chunk: chunk_0006_13b210
source_lang: en
target_lang: zh

expression_transfer: Useful for natural everyday actions in spoken or written contexts.

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: How to reconcile the fact that they are {{c1::doing so well}}(表现得如此出色) on evals? You look at the evals and you go, “Those are {{c2::pretty hard evals}}(评估起来相当困难).” They are doing so well.
original: How to reconcile the fact that they are doing so well on evals? You look at the evals and you go, “Those are pretty hard evals.” They are doing so well.
translation: 如何解释它们在评估中表现如此出色这一事实呢？你看看那些评估题目，会发现‘这些评估题真的很难’，可它们却做得这么好。
note:
phrases: doing so well | pretty hard evals
title: Ilya-Sutskever
source: 
chunk: chunk_0005_f794b9
source_lang: en
target_lang: zh
phrase_types: strong_collocation

expression_transfer: Useful for producing native-like collocations in formal discussion.

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: I think your point, about how from the average person’s {{c1::point of view}}(从某个视角来看) nothing is that different, will {{c2::continue being true}}(继续保持真实) even into the singularity. Ilya Sutskever No, I don’t think so.
original: I think your point, about how from the average person’s point of view nothing is that different, will continue being true even into the singularity. Ilya Sutskever No, I don’t think so.
translation: 我认为你的观点——从普通人的角度来看，一切似乎并没有太大不同——即使进入奇点后仍然成立。伊利亚·苏茨克弗：不，我不这么认为。
note:
phrases: point of view | continue being true
title: Ilya-Sutskever
source: 
chunk: chunk_0002_2fe0f2
source_lang: en
target_lang: zh
phrase_types: strong_collocation
transfer: Useful for producing native-like collocations in formal discussion.
expression_transfer: Useful for producing native-like collocations in formal discussion.

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: AI is going to be diffused through the economy. There’ll be {{c1::very strong economic forces}}(非常强大的经济力量) for this, and I think the impact is going to be {{c2::felt very strongly}}(感觉非常强烈).
original: AI is going to be diffused through the economy. There’ll be very strong economic forces for this, and I think the impact is going to be felt very strongly.
translation: 人工智能将会渗透到经济的各个领域。这种趋势将受到强大的经济力量推动，我认为其影响将会非常显著。
note:
phrases: very strong economic forces | felt very strongly
title: Ilya-Sutskever
source:

source_lang: en
target_lang: zh
phrase_types: strong_collocation
transfer: Useful for producing native-like collocations in formal discussion.
expression_transfer: Useful for producing native-like collocations in formal discussion.

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: You look at the evals and you go, “Those are {{c1::pretty hard evals}}(评估起来相当困难).” They are doing so well. But the economic impact seems to be dramatically behind.
original: You look at the evals and you go, “Those are pretty hard evals.” They are doing so well. But the economic impact seems to be dramatically behind.
translation: 你看看那些评估结果，会发现这些测试题相当难。它们的表现却好得惊人。但经济上的影响却明显滞后。
note:
phrases: pretty hard evals

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: What does it mean? It means that you see it in the news, that {{c1::such and such}}(如此这般) company announced such and such {{c2::dollar amount}}(金额).
original: What does it mean? It means that you see it in the news, that such and such company announced such and such dollar amount.
translation: 这意味着什么？这意味着你能在新闻里看到，某家公司宣布了某项金额的投入或成果。
note:
phrases: such and such | dollar amount

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: We {{c1::get used to}}(习惯) things {{c2::pretty fast}}(相当快), {{c3::it turns out}}(结果发现). But also it’s {{c4::kind of abstract}}(有点抽象).
original: We get used to things pretty fast, it turns out. But also it’s kind of abstract.
translation: 我们对事物的适应速度竟然这么快，但这也有些抽象。
note:
phrases: get used to | pretty fast | it turns out | kind of abstract
title: Ilya-Sutskever

target_lang: zh

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: The more whimsical explanation is that maybe RL training makes the models {{c1::a little too}}(稍微有点过) single-minded and {{c2::narrowly focused}}(专注于狭窄的领域), {{c3::a little bit}}(有一点) too unaware, even though it also makes them aware {{c4::in some other ways}}(在其他一些方面). Because of this, they can’t do basic things.
original: The more whimsical explanation is that maybe RL training makes the models a little too single-minded and narrowly focused, a little bit too unaware, even though it also makes them aware in some other ways. Because of this, they can’t do basic things.
translation: 更有趣的一种解释是，也许强化学习训练让模型变得过于专注和狭隘，甚至有点迟钝，尽管它也在其他方面让模型变得更有意识。正因如此，它们反而无法完成一些基础任务。
note:
phrases: a little too | narrowly focused | a little bit | in some other ways
title: Ilya-Sutskever
source: 
chunk: chunk_0007_c84335
source_lang: en
target_lang: zh

expression_transfer: Useful for lifting specific examples into a broader claim.

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: But I think the impact of AI is going to be felt. AI is going to be {{c1::diffused through the economy}}(在经济中扩散开来).
original: But I think the impact of AI is going to be felt. AI is going to be diffused through the economy.
translation: 但我认为人工智能的影响将会显现出来。人工智能将渗透到整个经济体系中。
note:
phrases: diffused through the economy
